category_title: ADHD-diagnosed student who seeks social contact and struggles with exclusion and medication-dependent behavior
minimal_context: Jacob is sitting near his classmates working on an independent assignment in the classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for independent work. Please complete the assignment at your desk.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Turns around in his seat to observe what his classmates are doing)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please look at your own work.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: It is difficult to concentrate because I feel I must comprehend everything.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep trying to do your assignment.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Notices a child sitting nearby signaling for help from the teacher) I can help! (Immediately gets up and goes over to help the classmate)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time for independent work. Please complete the assignment at your desk.

STUDENT: (Turns around in his seat to observe what his classmates are doing)

TUTOR: Please look at your own work.

STUDENT: It is difficult to concentrate because I feel I must comprehend everything.

TUTOR: Keep trying to do your assignment.

STUDENT: (Notices a child sitting nearby signaling for help from the teacher) I can help! (Immediately gets up and goes over to help the classmate)

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: There is a child sitting near Jacob who signals for help from the teacher
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Jacob immediately gets up and goes over to help

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Jacob turns around a lot in order to observe what his classmates are doing
related_quotes: it is difficult to concentrate because he feels he must comprehend everything.
